accepted: five replaceable bearer profiles without a universal winner
bearer-independent signed OpenBREC overlay and transport trust boundary
per-mission decision contract covering alternatives and known gaps
four regulatory modes including bounded expiring emergency assumed risk
primary-source review with per-implementation pin and re-review policy
ten transport residuals resolved, controlled, planned or evidence-required
not_accepted: any exact hardware, firmware or network-server implementation
physical range, scale, hops, latency, airtime, energy or coexistence
BPv7 conformance or any unimplemented extension
OS-04 or later Open Spec tasks
